sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَحَطَّةِ الْقِطَارِ لِأُسَافِرَ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam na željezničku stanicu kako bih otputovao u drugi grad.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the train station to travel to another city.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ تَذْكِرَةَ الذَّهَابِ وَالْعَوْدَةِ مِنَ الشُّبَّاكِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam povratnu kartu na šalteru.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a round-trip ticket from the window.

sentences.arabic: رَكِبْتُ الْقِطَارَ السَّرِيعَ فِي السَّاعَةِ الْعَاشِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ušao sam u brzi voz u deset sati.
sentences.translationEn: I boarded the high-speed train at ten o'clock.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ بِجَانِبِ النَّافِذَةِ لِأُشَاهِدَ الْمَنَاظِرَ الطَّبِيعِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo sam pored prozora da posmatram prirodne pejzaže.
sentences.translationEn: I sat by the window to watch the natural landscapes.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْقِطَارُ فِي مَوْعِدِهِ الْمُحَدَّدِ دُونَ تَأْخِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Voz je stigao u zakazano vrijeme bez kašnjenja.
sentences.translationEn: The train arrived at its scheduled time without delay.
